# Bullinger Family Genealogy

## Description
Bullinger family genealogy in GEDCOM 5.5.1 format. A comprehensive family tree created with the Gramps genealogy application, containing multiple generations of family data with relationships, dates, and biographical information.

## Test Case Type
- **Real family genealogy**: Documented multi-generational family tree
- **Open-source software output**: Exported from Gramps genealogy application
- **UTF-8 encoding testing**: Tests proper Unicode character handling
- **Medium complexity family structures**: Good for general compatibility testing

## File Information
- **GEDCOM Version**: 5.5.1
- **Format**: `.ged` (standard GEDCOM text format)
- **Size**: ~306 KB
- **Encoding**: UTF-8
- **Source Software**: Gramps 5.0.1

## Provenance
- **Source**: Unknown genealogy sources (from public genealogy collections)
- **URL**: https://www.btoy1.net/Bullinger.ged
- **Availability**: Public genealogy data
- **Collection Date**: Various genealogy research

## License & Usage
- **License**: Public genealogy data
- **Attribution**: Original researchers
- **Usage Rights**: Educational and testing purposes
- **Restrictions**: Standard genealogy data restrictions apply

## Testing Coverage
- UTF-8 character encoding and validation
- Multi-generational family structures
- Open-source genealogy software compatibility (Gramps)
- Complex family relationships
- Real genealogical data
- Medium file size for general testing

## Notes
- Good for testing UTF-8 encoding support
- Demonstrates Gramps genealogy software export format
- Larger than Shakespeare but smaller than royal families
- Suitable for encoding validation and charset testing
- Real genealogical data for realistic import testing
- Useful for cross-software compatibility testing (Gramps -> other platforms)
